title: Add 100-Star Website Rating Display in Upper-Right Corner Near Wishlist

requirements.summary: Add a website rating display showing '100 / 100 stars' in the upper-right corner of the Header component, positioned alongside the existing wishlist button, styled consistently with the blue-crystal-moon brand palette.
acceptanceCriteria: A star rating widget is visible in the upper-right corner of the header on all screen sizes.
The rating displays 100 out of 100 stars (or a compact representation such as '★ 100/100' or '100 ★').
The rating widget is positioned near the wishlist button without overlapping it.
The component uses the existing brand color palette and font styles from the project.
The rating is visible on both mobile and desktop layouts.

file_operations.description: Add a static website rating display (100 stars out of 100) in the upper-right corner of the header, positioned between the logo and the existing wishlist button. Use a star icon (★) with numeric label styled consistently with the blue-crystal-moon palette. Ensure the rating widget is responsive and visible on both mobile and desktop without overlapping the wishlist button or loyalty points badge. Maintain the existing sticky header behavior, logo, wishlist functionality, and loyalty points display.
